case_title: BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY, INC. VS. WESTERN BOAT SHOP, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-13-2018 CONTINUED TO AUG-15-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100044203)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-25-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-15-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY, INC. , A CORPORATION DBA BIRITE FOODSERVICE DISTRIBUTORS AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN BOAT SHOP, INC. , A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, DBA WESTERN BOAT AND TACKLE DOES I THROUGH X, AND EACH OF THEM, INCLUSIVE HILL, SCOT , INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA WESTERN BOAT AND TACKLE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-13-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-16-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-21-2018
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-25-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
